title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MAURINGON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARACELI, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4643 / 58 OG No. 24, 4482 (June 11, 1962)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 3375, June 18, 1961 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MAURINGON IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ARACELI, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Mauringon in the Municipality of Araceli, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Mauringon.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted, without Executive approval, June 18, 1961.
